examples: Law is the best hedge we have against "the domination of partiality and desire".
Now Joseph's brothers are jealous of Jacob's partiality to Joseph, and they conspire to get rid of him.
She has a partiality for exotic flowers.
Bruce is not alone in displaying a fierce partiality to his corner of the Scilly Isles.
It is easy to see why the truth commission might be suspected of partiality.
